recommendations.title: The Clique
recommendations.overview: A young girl tries to fit in with a clique of popular middle school girls after moving into the guest house of one of their homes.

recommendations.title: The Snowman
recommendations.overview: A young boy makes a snowman one Christmas Eve, which comes to life at midnight and takes him on a magical adventure to the North Pole to meet Santa Claus.

recommendations.title: Red One
recommendations.overview: After Santa Claus (codename: Red One) is kidnapped, the North Pole's Head of Security must team up with the world's most infamous tracker in a globe-trotting, action-packed mission to save Christmas.

recommendations.title: The Santa Clause
recommendations.overview: On Christmas Eve, divorced dad Scott Calvin and his son discover Santa Claus has fallen off their roof. When Scott takes the reins of the magical sleigh, he finds he is now the new Santa, and must convince a world of disbelievers, including himself.

recommendations.title: Sharpay's Fabulous Adventure

recommendations.title: Tooth Fairy

recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction

recommendations.title: Saving Santa
recommendations.overview: A lowly stable elf finds that he is the only one who can stop an invasion of the North Pole by using the secret of Santa's Sleigh, a TimeGlobe, to travel back in time to Save Santa - twice.
